arts.ttl: Swansea make it five wins in a row
arts.sum: Resurgent Swansea made it five consecutive Championship wins by beating QPR 2-1 and further boosting Alan Sheehan's chances of taking permanent charge.

arts.ttl: Swansea City make it five in a row at QPR as Sheehan strengthens grip on top job
arts.sum: Swansea City beat QPR 2-1 in west London to rack up a fifth Championship victory on the spin

arts.ttl: Swansea extend winning run at QPR to boost Sheehan’s chances of permanent deal
arts.sum: Sheehan has now presided over seven wins and just two defeats from his 11 matches at the helm.

QPR were unable to stop resurgent Swansea winning their fifth game in row. It would have been five clean sheets in a row for the Welsh side had Karamoko Dembele not pulled a goal back for Rangers with their first effort on target.
